title: Easy Aerobic Absorb
objective: Keep rhythm while absorbing Monday's ride and Tuesday gym before Thursday's threshold confidence check.
why_now: You felt strong Monday, but the next useful step is a controlled proof point, not making the support day harder.

source_context.week_objective: Restart rhythm and validate threshold readiness without catch-up fatigue.

targets.notes: Outdoor only if it fits easily and there is a clean 60-minute window. Ride easy endurance/low Z2 at about 55-68% FTP after a gentle ramp. This should feel easy enough that Thursday still looks attractive.

warmup.notes: Start easy and ramp gradually into low endurance. The warmup should never feel harder than the main ride.

steps.notes: Easy endurance/low Z2. No hidden tempo.

cooldown.notes: Ease down below the main ride. Keep pressure light and let the legs unload.

nutrition.pre: Normal meal timing is enough. If hungry, add 20-30g carbs 30-60 min before.
nutrition.during: Water to thirst. No ride carbs needed if well-fed; take 10-20g carbs only if starting hungry or feeling flat.
nutrition.supplements: Today's workout needs: none required. Daily baseline only if already part of routine.

recovery.post_session: Normal meal and fluids to thirst.
recovery.next_morning_check: Thursday proceeds only if legs feel normal and the ride felt clearly easy.

skill_focus.action: Keep rises capped and pressure light.
skill_focus.why: The ride adds rhythm without stealing from the threshold confidence check.

skill_focus.action: Use relaxed hands and an easy gear when the road tilts up.
skill_focus.why: Low-torque pedaling helps keep the left calf quiet.

mental_focus.why: This support ride improves the week only if it leaves the proof-point session better.
mental_focus.reset: If you start chasing speed, exhale once, shift easier, relax hands and jaw, and ride below 60% FTP for 2 minutes.

pre_interval_cues: Skip if Tuesday gym leaves leg heaviness or if there is not a clean 60-minute outdoor window.
during_workout_cues: Let the ride feel too easy.
execution_notes.if_too_hard: If legs feel wrong before starting, rest instead. If already riding, turn home easy; do not turn this into a forced workout.
execution_notes.success_criteria: You finish fresher and still want to do Thursday.
